subject: docs(claude): note UTIL_ env vars map to synctone Supabase + sandbox limits
body:
Future Claude Code web sessions reading lib/supabase.ts will look for
EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL / EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY and find neither.
The values are actually exported as UTIL_SUPABASE_URL / UTIL_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
(project ref kmqcbpeidmmintltcoqm). Also records that api.supabase.com is
host-not-allowed in the sandbox, so `supabase` CLI commands don't work
without an allowlist change — only direct REST against *.supabase.co does.

Tags: docs, supabase, session-onboarding, env
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: message-scheduling
Semver: patch
